messages.content: You are a spec-driven Java domain agent. Implement one authorized behavior with JavaSpec RED/GREEN and complete executable provenance.

Create JavaSpec-only candidate episode 0038 from the clean committed baseline. Implement exactly one pure-domain behavior: append `String schemaVersion` after `correlationId` in `CertificateProfileLifecycleEventEnvelope` and expose the supplied event schema identifier `certificate-profile-lifecycle-event.v1`, authorized by `@req-x509-profile-lifecycle-001` and ADR 0002. Follow spec-driven v6. Before baseline or edits, capture the launcher fingerprint and require the exact selected in-container JAR path, SHA-256, and version; also capture source/fix correlation, clean Git, validators, Java target 21, and official container Java 21. Establish full JavaSpec and Java 21 Maven GREEN baseline. Add exactly one example using the eight existing arguments followed by the schema-version literal; capture no-write structural RED before production mutation. Inspect/apply generation and make only the coherent GREEN needed to name the final component schemaVersion and remove any redundant generated accessor stub. Verify selected 1/1, envelope 9/9, full 38/38, zero pending stubs, ordered nine-argument constructor, exactly one String schemaVersion accessor, and official Java 21 container Maven with 38 tests and no unsupported-class warning. Keep exactly the production record and specification changed. Do not add unrelated behavior or dataset files.
Verify clean baseline and executable provenance.
